description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Make CI (MSYS2 for Windows) that runs on every push to all branches and on all pull requests to any branch. Use a single windows-latest job with a matrix strategy to test various build configurations, including different editions, compilers, targets, and CPU architectures. For each matrix combination, check out the repository, install required packages using MSYS2, run a PowerShell script to build the project, and upload the resulting build artifacts.
